narrative:
Buckeye Lake Village (precinct in Licking County) has 1,609 registered voters, with 60.1% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 26.9% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 13.0%, a pronounced Republican lean of 13.9 percentage points.
